file_name: Array BioPharma Inc. - LICENSE, DEVELOPMENT AND COMMERCIALIZATION AGREEMENT.txt

perturbation.original_text: Then, the corresponding milestone payment shall be due within thirty (30) days of receipt by Ono of an invoice for payment and the taxation documents delivered from Array. Ono shall notify Array in writing within fifteen (15) Business Days after the achievement of each milestone set out in Section 6.2(b) by Ono, or any of its Affiliates or Sublicensees. Then, the corresponding milestone payment shall be due within thirty (30) days of receipt by Ono of an invoice and the taxation documents delivered from Array.
perturbation.changed_text: Then, the corresponding milestone payment shall be due within thirty (30) days of receipt by Ono of an invoice for payment and the taxation documents delivered from Array. Ono shall notify Array in writing within sixty (60) Business Days after the achievement of each milestone set out in Section 6.2(b) by Ono, or any of its Affiliates or Sublicensees. Then, the corresponding milestone payment shall be due within forty-five (45) days of receipt by Ono of an invoice and the taxation documents delivered from Array.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction regarding the deadline for Ono to notify Array of milestone achievements and for the corresponding payment. The notification period changes from 'fifteen (15) Business Days' to 'sixty (60) Business Days' and payment deadline changes from 'thirty (30) days' to 'forty-five (45) days' of receipt by Ono of an invoice and the taxation documents delivered from Array, creating uncertainty as to which deadline is enforceable. This affects Array's cash flow predictability and introduces potential disputes.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Array shall notify Ono in writing within fifteen (15) Business Days after the achievement of each milestone set out in Section 6.2(a) by Array. Then, the corresponding milestone payment shall be due within thirty (30) days of receipt by Ono of an invoice for payment and the taxation documents delivered from Array. Ono shall notify Array in writing within sixty (60) Business Days after the achievement of each milestone set out in Section 6.2(b) by Ono, or any of its Affiliates or Sublicensees. Then, the corresponding milestone payment shall be due within forty-five (45) days of receipt by Ono of an invoice and the taxation documents delivered from Array. Any milestone payable by Ono pursuant to this Section 6.2 shall be made only once with respect to the achievement of each milestone set out in Section 6.2(a) and Section
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the notification period from 'fifteen (15) Business Days' to 'sixty (60) Business Days' for Ono to notify Array of milestone achievements related to Section 6.2(b), and the payment deadline changes from 'thirty (30) days' to 'forty-five (45) days'. The contradicted text states 'Ono shall notify Array in writing within sixty (60) Business Days after the achievement of each milestone set out in Section 6.2(b) by Ono' and 'Then, the corresponding milestone payment shall be due within forty-five (45) days of receipt by Ono of an invoice and the taxation documents delivered from Array.'. Thus, the contradiction exists within the same piece of text due to the perturbation introduced. It creates an internal inconsistency within Section 6.2 as both fifteen (15) and sixty (60) day notification periods are now specified, as well as both thirty (30) and forty-five (45) day payment deadlines. This ambiguity introduces an in-text contradiction regarding which notification deadline and payment term are enforceable, creating uncertainty and potential disputes.

perturbation.original_text: Within forty five (45) days after the end of each calendar quarter, commencing with the calendar quarter in which the First Commercial Sale occurs, Ono shall deliver to Array a report (each, a "Royalty Report") setting out all details necessary to calculate the payments due under this Section 6.3, including: (i) gross sales of the Product in the Ono Territory in the relevant calendar quarter on a country-by-country basis; (ii) Net Sales in the relevant calendar quarter on a country-by-country basis; (iii) all relevant exchange rate conversions in accordance with Section 7.2; (iv) all deductions in total in accordance with Sections 1.48 and 6.5; and (v) the amount of any payment due from Ono to Array, calculated in accordance with this Article 6. Simultaneously with the delivery of each such report, Ono shall pay to Array the total amounts due under Section 6.3 for the period covered by such report subject to Ono's receipt of taxation documents.
perturbation.changed_text: Within forty five (45) days after the end of each calendar quarter, commencing with the calendar quarter in which the First Commercial Sale occurs, Ono shall deliver to Array a report (each, a "Royalty Report") setting out all details necessary to calculate the payments due under this Section 6.3, including: (i) gross sales of the Product in the Ono Territory in the relevant calendar quarter on a country-by-country basis; (ii) Net Sales in the relevant calendar quarter on a country-by-country basis; (iii) all relevant exchange rate conversions in accordance with Section 7.2; (iv) all deductions in total in accordance with Sections 1.48 and 6.5; and (v) the amount of any payment due from Ono to Array, calculated in accordance with this Article 6. Ono shall pay to Array the total amounts due under Section 6.3 for the period covered by such report subject to Ono's receipt of taxation documents sixty (60) days after delivery of each such report.
perturbation.explanation: This introduces an in-text contradiction regarding the timing of royalty payments. Initially, payment is due 'simultaneously' with the Royalty Report. The modified text changes this, stating payment is due 'sixty (60) days after delivery of each such report'. This discrepancy creates ambiguity over when payment is expected.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Within forty five (45) days after the end of each calendar quarter, commencing with the calendar quarter in which the First Commercial Sale occurs, Ono shall deliver to Array a report (each, a "Royalty Report") setting out all details necessary to calculate the payments due under this Section 6.3, including: (i) gross sales of the Product in the Ono Territory in the relevant calendar quarter on a country-by-country basis; (ii) Net Sales in the relevant calendar quarter on a country-by-country basis; (iii) all relevant exchange rate conversions in accordance with Section 7.2; (iv) all deductions in total in accordance with Sections 1.48 and 6.5; and (v) the amount of any payment due from Ono to Array, calculated in accordance with this Article 6. Ono shall pay to Array the total amounts due under Section 6.3 for the period covered by such report subject to Ono's receipt of taxation documents sixty (60) days after delivery of each such report.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that payment was due 'simultaneously' with the delivery of the Royalty Report. The changed text explicitly states that payment is due 'sixty (60) days after delivery of each such report'. This directly contradicts the original instruction of simultaneous payment. This creates a clear and direct inconsistency in the payment terms, leading to a strong in-text contradiction as per the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition.

perturbation.original_text: 7.1 Payment Method. All payments under this Agreement shall be made by bank wire transfer in immediately available funds to an account designated by the Party to which such payments are due. Any payments or portions thereof due under this Agreement that are not paid by the date such payments are due under this Agreement shall bear interest at a rate equal Libor US Dollars one month with respect to payments in US Dollars, or the one month equivalent interbank offered rate with respect to payments in other currencies, plus in each case [ * ] per year, calculated on the number of days such payment is delinquent, compounded monthly and computed on the basis of a three hundred sixty five (365) day year.
perturbation.changed_text: 7.1 Payment Method. All payments under this Agreement shall be made by bank wire transfer in immediately available funds to an account designated by the Party to which such payments are due. Any payments or portions thereof due under this Agreement that are not paid by the date such payments are due under this Agreement shall bear interest at a rate equal Libor US Dollars one month with respect to payments in US Dollars, or the one month equivalent interbank offered rate with respect to payments in other currencies, plus in each case [ * ] per year, calculated on the number of days such payment is delinquent, compounded annually and computed on the basis of a three hundred sixty (360) day year.
perturbation.explanation: This introduces an in-text contradiction regarding the method in which the interest would be compounded annually. Initially, payments or portions that are not paid by the date due, would be 'compounded monthly and computed on the basis of a three hundred sixty five (365) day year'. The changed text states 'compounded annually and computed on the basis of a three hundred sixty (360) day year.', causing ambiguity over how the payments would be calculated, thus creating legal uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All payments under this Agreement shall be made by bank wire transfer in immediately available funds to an account designated by the Party to which such payments are due. Any payments or portions thereof due under this Agreement that are not paid by the date such payments are due under this Agreement shall bear interest at a rate equal Libor US Dollars one month with respect to payments in US Dollars, or the one month equivalent interbank offered rate with respect to payments in other currencies, plus in each case [ * ] per year, calculated on the number of days such payment is delinquent, compounded annually and computed on the basis of a three hundred sixty (360) day year. This Section 7.1 shall in no way limit any other remedies available to the Parties.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that interest will be 'compounded monthly and computed on the basis of a three hundred sixty five (365) day year'. The changed text modifies this to 'compounded annually and computed on the basis of a three hundred sixty (360) day year'. This directly contradicts the original text regarding the compounding period (monthly vs. annually) and the basis for computation (365 vs. 360 days). The contradiction occurs within the same Section 7.1 as highlighted by the provided 'Contradicted Text' and directly impacts how interest is calculated, creating legal uncertainty.
